target_audience: Small teams, small companies, open-source maintainers, and vibe-coding groups using multiple Codex threads in one repository.
purpose: Coordinate one lead agent and one or more member agents through explicit roles, task state, module ownership, announcements, handoffs, append-only logs, and fail-closed role checks.
explicit_invocation_examples: $team-lead-collaboration Initialize and govern collaboration for this project as the registered lead actor.
$team-member-collaboration Read current announcements, accept my assigned task, and work only inside my authorized module.
conflict_behavior: Opposite role in the same session returns ROLE_SESSION_CONFLICT.
security_notes: Hooks are guardrails, not a sandbox. collabctl fails closed without session_id.
